{body}\")\n\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n    def _format_exception_message(self, exception: dict) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Format an exception as a prominent Telegram message.\"\"\"\n *telegram.Poller) http.HandlerFunc {\n308\t\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n309\t\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodGet && r.Method != http.MethodPost {\n310\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n311\t\t\t\treturn\n312\t\t\t}\n313\t\t\tvar req contract.GetMessageRequest\n314\t\t\tif r.Method == http.MethodPost {\n315\t\t\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {\n316\t\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"invalid JSON: \"+err.Error())\n317\t\t\t\t\treturn\n318\t\t\t\t}\n319\t\t\t} else {\n320\t\t\t\t// GET method: parse from query string\n321\t\t\t\tchatIDStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"chat_id\")\n322\t\t\t\tmessageIDStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"message_id\")\n323\t\t\t\tif chatIDStr == \"\" || messageIDStr == \"\" {\n324\t\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"missing chat_id or message_id\")\n325\t\t\t\t\treturn\n326\t\t\t\t}\n327\t\t\t\tvar err error\n328\t\t\t\treq.ChatID, err = strconv.ParseInt(chatIDStr, 10, 64)\n329\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n330\t\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"invalid chat_id\")\n331\t\t\t\t\treturn\n332\t\t\t\t}\n333\t\t\t\treq.MessageID, err = strconv.ParseInt(messageIDStr, 10, 64)\n334\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n335\t\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"invalid message_id\")\n336\t\t\t\t\treturn\n337\t\t\t\t}\n338\t\t\t}\n339\t\n340\t\t\tmsgContent := p.GetMessage(req.ChatID, req.MessageID)\n341\t\t\tif msgContent == nil {\n342\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"message not found in cache (may be too old)\")\n343\t\t\t\treturn\n344\t\t\t}\n345\t\n346\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n347\t\t\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(contract.GetMessageResponse{\n348\t\t\t\tOK:      true,\n349\t\t\t\tMessage: msgContent,\n350\t\t\t}); err != nil {\n351\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"get_message encode: %v\", err)\n352\t\t\t}\n353\t\t}\n354\t}\n355\t\n356\tfunc handleAnswerCallback(s *telegram.Sender) http.HandlerFunc {\n357\t\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n358\t\t\tif r.Method != http.MethodPost {\n359\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"method not allowed\", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\n360\t\t\t\treturn\n361\t\t\t}\n362\t\t\tvar req contract.AnswerCallbackRequest\n363\t\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil /file/{file_id}.\n379\t// It calls Telegram's getFile to resolve the file_path, then streams the bytes from\n380\t// the Telegram file CDN. Returns 404 for invalid/expired file_id, 413 if > 20MB.\n381\tfunc handleFile(s *telegram.Sender) http.HandlerFunc {\n382\t\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n383\t\t\tfileID := r.PathValue(\"file_id\")\n384\t\t\tif fileID == \"\" {\n385\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"missing file_id\")\n386\t\t\t\treturn\n387\t\t\t}\n388\t\n389\t\t\ttgFile, apiErr := s.GetFile(r.Context(), fileID)\n390\t\t\tif apiErr != nil {\n391\t\t\t\t// Telegram 400-range errors mean invalid or expired file_id.\n392\t\t\t\tif apiErr.ErrorCode >= 400 && apiErr.ErrorCode < 500 {\n393\t\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not found or expired\")\n394\t\t\t\t\treturn\n395\t\t\t\t}\n396\t\t\t\twriteTelegramError(w, apiErr)\n397\t\t\t\treturn\n398\t\t\t}\n399\t\n400\t\t\tif tgFile.FilePath == nil {\n401\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not available\")\n402\t\t\t\treturn\n403\t\t\t}\n404\t\n405\t\t\tif tgFile.FileSize != nil && *tgFile.FileSize > telegram.MaxFileSize {\n406\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusRequestEntityTooLarge, 413, \"file exceeds 20MB limit\")\n407\t\t\t\treturn\n408\t\t\t}\n409\t\n410\t\t\tresp, err := s.DownloadFile(r.Context(), *tgFile.FilePath)\n411\t\t\tif err != nil {\n412\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadGateway, 502, fmt.Sprintf(\"download failed: %v\", err))\n413\t\t\t\treturn\n414\t\t\t}\n415\t\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n416\t\n417\t\t\tif resp.StatusCode == http.StatusNotFound {\n418\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not found or expired\")\n419\t\t\t\treturn\n420\t\t\t}\n421\t\t\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {\n422\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadGateway, 502, fmt.Sprintf(\"Telegram returned %d\", resp.StatusCode))\n423\t\t\t\treturn\n424\t\t\t}\n425\t\n426\t\t\tct := resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n427\t\t\tif ct == \"\" {\n428\t\t\t\tct = \"application/octet-stream\"\n429\t\t\t}\n430\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", ct)\n431\t\n432\t\t\tif cl := resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Length\"); cl != \"\" {\n433\t\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", cl)\n434\t\t\t}\n435\t\n436\t\t\tfilename := path.Base(*tgFile.FilePath)\n437\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Disposition\", fmt.Sprintf(`attachment; filename=%q`, filename))\n438\t\n439\t\t\tif _, err := io.Copy(w, resp.Body); err != nil {\n440\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"file stream %s: %v\", fileID, err)\n441\t\t\t}\n442\t\t}\n443\t}\n444\t\n445\tconst (\n446\t\tmaxPhotoSize    = 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10MB\n447\t\tmaxMediaSize    = 50 * 1024 * 1024 // 50MB for document/audio/video\n448\t\tmultipartMemory = 32 * 1024 * 1024 // max memory for multipart parsing (rest goes to disk)\n449\t)\n450\t\n451\t// parseMediaForm parses a multipart form with the given size limit and returns the\n452\t// required chat_id. Returns false and writes an error if parsing or chat_id fails.\n453\tfunc parseMediaForm(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, maxSize int64) (chatID int64, ok bool) {\n454\t\tr.Body = http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, maxSize+4096) // +4096 for form fields\n455\t\tif err := r.ParseMultipartForm(multipartMemory); err != nil {\n456\t\t\tvar maxErr *http.MaxBytesError\n457\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &maxErr) {\n458\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusRequestEntityTooLarge, 413, fmt.Sprintf(\"file exceeds %dMB limit\", maxSize/1024/1024))\n459\t\t\t} else {\n460\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"invalid multipart form: \"+err.Error())\n461\t\t\t}\n462\t\t\treturn 0, false\n463\t\t}\n464\t\tchatIDStr := r.FormValue(\"chat_id\")\n465\t\tchatID, err := strconv.ParseInt(chatIDStr, 10, 64)\n466\t\tif err != nil || chatID == 0 {\n467\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"invalid or missing chat_id\")\n468\t\t\treturn 0, false\n469\t\t}\n470\t\treturn chatID, true\n471\t}\n472\t\n473\t// optionalInt64 parses a form value as int64, returning nil if absent.\n474\tfunc optionalInt64(r *http.Request, key string) *int64 {\n475\t\tif v := r.FormValue(key); v != \"\" {\n476\t\t\tif n, err := strconv.ParseInt(v, 10, 64); err == nil {\n477\t\t\t\treturn &n\n478\t\t\t}\n479\t\t}\n480\t\treturn nil\n481\t}\n482\t\n483\t// optionalInt parses a form value as int, returning nil if absent.\n484\tfunc optionalInt(r *http.Request, key string) *int {\n485\t\tif v := r.FormValue(key); v != \"\" {\n486\t\t\tif n, err := strconv.Atoi(v); err == nil {\n487\t\t\t\treturn &n\n488\t\t\t}\n489\t\t}\n490\t\treturn nil\n491\t}\n492\t\n493\t// optionalStr returns a pointer to the form value if non-empty, else nil.\n494\tfunc optionalStr(r *http.Request, key string) *string {\n495\t\tif v := r.FormValue(key); Returns 404 for invalid/expired file_id, 413 if > 20MB.\nfunc handleFile(s *telegram.Sender) http.HandlerFunc {\n\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\t\tfileID := r.PathValue(\"file_id\")\n\t\tif fileID == \"\" {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, 400, \"missing file_id\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttgFile, apiErr := s.GetFile(r.Context(), fileID)\n\t\tif apiErr != nil {\n\t\t\t// Telegram 400-range errors mean invalid or expired file_id.\n\t\t\tif apiErr.ErrorCode >= 400 && apiErr.ErrorCode < 500 {\n\t\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not found or expired\")\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\twriteTelegramError(w, apiErr)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif tgFile.FilePath == nil {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not available\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif tgFile.FileSize != nil && *tgFile.FileSize > telegram.MaxFileSize {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusRequestEntityTooLarge, 413, \"file exceeds 20MB limit\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tresp, err := s.DownloadFile(r.Context(), *tgFile.FilePath)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadGateway, 502, fmt.Sprintf(\"download failed: %v\", err))\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close()\n\n\t\tif resp.StatusCode == http.StatusNotFound {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusNotFound, 404, \"file not found or expired\")\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {\n\t\t\twriteProxyError(w, http.StatusBadGateway, 502, fmt.Sprintf(\"Telegram returned %d\", resp.StatusCode))\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tct := resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Type\")\n\t\tif ct == \"\" {\n\t\t\tct = \"application/octet-stream\"\n\t\t}\n\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", ct)\n\n\t\tif cl := resp.Header.Get(\"Content-Length\"); cl != \"\" {\n\t\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Length\", cl)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfilename := path.Base(*tgFile.FilePath)\n\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Disposition\", fmt.Sprintf(`attachment; filename=%q`, filename))\n\n\t\tif _, err := io.Copy(w, resp.Body); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"file stream %s: %v\", fileID, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\nconst (\n\tmaxPhotoSize    = 10 * 1024 * 1024 // 10MB\n\tmaxMediaSize    = 50 * 1024 * 1024 // 50MB for document/audio/video\n\tmultipartMemory = 32 * 1024 * 1024 // max memory for multipart parsing (rest goes to disk)\n)\n\n// parseMediaForm parses a multipart form with the given size limit and returns the\n// required chat_id. sync.Mutex\n}\n\n// check returns true if the user is within the rate limit, false if exceeded.\nfunc (ul *userLimiter) check() bool {\n\tul.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer ul.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\t// Remove messages older than the rate limit window\n\tcutoff := now.Add(-rateLimitWindow)\n\tvalid := ul.messages[:0]\n\tfor _, t := range ul.messages {\n\t\tif t.After(cutoff) {\n\t\t\tvalid = append(valid, t)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tul.messages = valid\n\n\t// Check if user has exceeded the rate limit\n\tif len(ul.messages) >= maxMessagesPerMinute {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\t// Add current message\n\tul.messages = append(ul.messages, now)\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// rateLimiter manages per-user rate limiting.\ntype rateLimiter struct {\n\tlimiters map[int64]*userLimiter\n\tmu       sync.RWMutex\n}\n\n// newRateLimiter creates a new rate limiter.\nfunc newRateLimiter() *rateLimiter {\n\treturn &rateLimiter{\n\t\tlimiters: make(map[int64]*userLimiter),\n\t}\n}\n\n// check context.Context, update contract.Update)\n\n// Router classifies incoming updates and dispatches them to the appropriate handler.\n// It is the security boundary: updates from unauthorized users are dropped here\n// before reaching any handler.\ntype Router struct {\n\tdb             *DB\n\trateLimiter    *rateLimiter\n\teventPublisher events.Publishable\n\n\t// OnCommand is called for bot commands in the General topic.\n\tOnCommand CommandHandlerFunc\n\n\t// OnService is called for service messages (topic lifecycle, member changes).\n\tOnService ServiceHandlerFunc\n\n\t// OnSession is called for messages in named forum topics.\n\tOnSession SessionHandlerFunc\n\n\t// OnCallback is called for callback_query updates.\n\tOnCallback CallbackHandlerFunc\n}\n\n// NewRouter returns a Router backed by db.\n// eventPublisher may be nil if event publishing is disabled.\nfunc NewRouter(db *DB, eventPublisher events.Publishable) *Router {\n\treturn &Router{\n\t\tdb:             db,\n\t\trateLimiter:    newRateLimiter(),\n\t\teventPublisher: eventPublisher,\n\t}\n}\n\n// Route classifies update and dispatches it to the registered handler.\n//\n// Routing order:\n//  1. Drop updates from unauthorized users silently.\n//  2. Rate limiting for non-callback, non-service messages.\n//  3. callback_query → OnCallback\n//  4. service message → OnService\n//  5. General topic (thread_id nil or 1) + command → OnCommand\n//  6. Named topic (thread_id non-nil, non-1) → look up session, then OnSession;\n//     if group is unregistered, drop silently.\n//\n// Non-command messages in the General topic are silently ignored.\nfunc (r *Router) Route(ctx context.Context, update contract.Update) {\n\t// ── 1. Authorization ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\tallowed, err := r.db.IsUserAllowed(ctx, update.FromUser.ID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[router] auth check failed for user %d: %v\", update.FromUser.ID, err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif !allowed {\n\t\treturn // silently drop\n\t}\n\n\t// ── 2. Rate limiting ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\t// Apply rate limits to non-callback, non-service messages\n\tif update.Type != \"callback_query\" && update.Type != \"service\" {\n\t\tif !r.rateLimiter.check(update.FromUser.ID) {\n\t\t\t// User has exceeded the rate limit - log and drop\n\t\t\tusername := \"\"\n\t\t\tif update.FromUser.Username != nil {\n\t\t\t\tusername = *update.FromUser.Username\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[router] rate limit exceeded for user %d (@%s), dropping message\",\n\t\t\t\tupdate.FromUser.ID, username)\n\t\t\treturn\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// ── 3. Callback query ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\tif update.Type == \"callback_query\" {\n\t\tif r.OnCallback != nil {\n\t\t\tr.OnCallback(ctx, update)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// ── 4. Service message ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\tif update.Type == \"service\" {\n\t\tif r.OnService != nil {\n\t\t\tr.OnService(ctx, update)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// ── 5. General topic ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\tisGeneral := update.ThreadID == nil || *update.ThreadID == generalTopicID\n\tif isGeneral {\n\t\tif update.Content != nil && update.Content.IsCommand() && r.OnCommand != nil {\n\t\t\tgroup, err := r.db.GetGroup(ctx, update.ChatID)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[router] get group for chat %d: %v\", update.ChatID, err)\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t// Publish command event (Phase 6 format)\n\t\t\tif r.eventPublisher != nil {\n\t\t\t\tcommand, args := update.Content.ExtractCommandAndArgs()\n\t\t\t\tusername := \"\"\n\t\t\t\tif update.FromUser.Username != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tusername = *update.FromUser.Username\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tr.eventPublisher.PublishCommand(\n\t\t\t\t\tupdate.ChatID,\n\t\t\t\t\tcommand,\n\t\t\t\t\targs,\n\t\t\t\t\t\"General\",\n\t\t\t\t\tevents.FormatUsername(username, update.FromUser.FirstName),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ok\",\n\t\t\t\t)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tr.OnCommand(ctx, update, group)\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Non-command messages in General topic are silently ignored.\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// ── 6. Named topic ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ttid := *update.ThreadID\n\n\t// Publish message received event (Phase 6 format)\n\tif r.eventPublisher != nil && update.Content != nil {\n\t\tusername := \"\"\n\t\tif update.FromUser.Username != nil {\n\t\t\tusername = *update.FromUser.Username\n\t\t}\n\t\tuser := events.FormatUsername(username, update.FromUser.FirstName)\n\n\t\t// Extract preview from text content\n\t\tpreview := \"\"\n\t\tif update.Content.Text != nil {\n\t\t\tpreview = events.TruncatePreview(*update.Content.Text, 100)\n\t\t} else if update.Content.Caption != nil {\n\t\t\tpreview = events.TruncatePreview(*update.Content.Caption, 100)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tpreview = update.Content.Type\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tr.eventPublisher.PublishMessageIn(\n\t\t\tupdate.ChatID,\n\t\t\ttid,\n\t\t\tevents.FormatTopicID(tid),\n\t\t\tuser,\n\t\t\tpreview,\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\tsession, err := r.db.GetSession(ctx, update.ChatID, tid)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[router] get session for (%d, %d): %v\", update.ChatID, tid, err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tif session != nil {\n\t\t// Existing session — dispatch directly.\n\t\tif r.OnSession != nil {\n\t\t\tr.OnSession(ctx, update, session, nil)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// No session — check whether this group is registered before creating one.\n\tgroup, err := r.db.GetGroup(ctx, update.ChatID)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[router] get group for chat %d: %v\", update.ChatID, err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif group == nil {\n\t\treturn // unregistered group — silently ignore\n\t}\n\n\t// Registered group, new topic — let the session handler create the session.\n\tif r.OnSession != nil {\n\t\tr.OnSession(ctx, update, nil, group)\n\t}\n}\n","numLines":284,"startLine":1,"totalLines":284}}}

c.Type != ContentTypeText || c.Text == nil || len(c.Entities) == 0 {\n272\t\t\treturn false\n273\t\t}\n274\t\te := c.Entities[0]\n275\t\treturn e.Type == \"bot_command\" && e.Offset == 0\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\t// ExtractCommandAndArgs parses a bot command from the content text.\n279\t// It returns the command (e.g. \"/start\") and the remaining text as args.\n280\t// Returns (\"\", \"\") if the content is not a command.\n281\tfunc (c *Content) ExtractCommandAndArgs() (command, args string) {\n282\t\tif !c.IsCommand() {\n283\t\t\treturn \"\", \"\"\n284\t\t}\n285\t\te := c.Entities[0]\n286\t\trunes := []rune(*c.Text)\n287\t\tif e.Length > len(runes) {\n288\t\t\treturn \"\", \"\"\n289\t\t}\n290\t\tcommand = string(runes[:e.Length])\n291\t\t// Strip @BotName suffix if present (e.g. \"/start@mybot\" → \"/start\")\n292\t\tif idx := strings.IndexByte(command, '@'); idx != -1 {\n293\t\t\tcommand = command[:idx]\n294\t\t}\n295\t\targs = strings.TrimSpace(string(runes[e.Length:]))\n296\t\treturn command, args\n297\t}\n298\t\n299\t// SendPhotoRequest holds metadata for POST /send_photo (multipart/form-data).\n300\t// The actual file
